name: Asahi Kashiwagi
description: He is an ordinary high school boy who can be found anywhere. One day, however, he suddenly finds himself caught in a love storm with five transfer students.

name: Asuha Touhara
description: Asuha is 10 years old, like Lotte. She became Lotte's best friend. ~!In reality she is the daughter of Naoya and Queen Mercelída, the "dead princess" Asuhariet, princess Astarotte's older half-sister (because succubus pregnancies are shorter). She doesn't know her mother is the Queen and Lotte her little sister. She has an adversion to underwear (she is half-succubus after all), and would very much rather go commando, much to Naoya's chagrin.!~

name: Bell Renjouji
description: __Height:__ 165cm (5'5") Bell Renjouji is a 14-year-old girl in 8th grade with a Sexy-type style. A famous Prism Star already, she sought to become the middle school manager of Prism Stone as a way to kill time when she met Naru Ayase, who became her rival. Usually calm, confident, and composed, she is a member of the rival team at Edel Rose that confronts Prism Stone.

name: Cheong
description: She is the main character of What Happens Inside the Dungeon. She is said to have left her hometown after being pushed away by her family, and is a fighter who can bite certain acupuncture points on her hands and fight with a strengthened body. She is innocent and naive to the sexually charged ways in these new lands.

name: Chikako Ubukata
description: She is a classmate of Tsukushi and Jin. She is a haughty and popular student, egotistical at first and quite hard on Tsukushi. After receiving lots of criticisms for a novel she wrote she decided to quit writing, so when she discovers Tsukushi's perseverance and effort in spite of the criticisms of many (including her) she softens up to him and decides to join the team as a manager.

name: Chinatsu Hayase
description: She is the younger sister of Masamune Makabe and currently attends middle school as a second year. She does not possess the same surname as her brother due to Masamune's choice of changing from Hayase to Makabe.

name: Clownpiece
description: Clownpiece is a fairy of Hell. With the flame of her torch, she is able to drive others insane. After the events of Legacy of Lunatic Kingdom she decided to stay in Gensoukyou, since she did not want to return to hell.

name: Diana Barry
description: Anne's dearest friend and kindred spirit. Anne and Diana become best friends from the moment they meet. She is the only girl of Anne's age who lives close to Green Gables. While Anne does not think Diana is very imaginative, Diana is noted for being pretty, merry and very amiable. She is often puzzled by Anne's extreme imagination, but she does have a little imagination of her own.

name: Fukuzou Moguro
description: A mysterious, jolly and seemingly supernatural salesman who offers people a chance to "fill the gap in their heart" free of charge. He always presents a specific set of conditions to follow in order for his client's wish to come true and warns them of the consequences that could follow. Over the course of each series, he punishes those that break the rules of their respective agreements - despite his warnings - using his signature "Boom!" ("ドーン!") gesture.

name: Gunsmith Bitch
description: A skilled underwear weapons merchant living in Daten City. She uses her own unique route to research, develop, and sell technology that can transform any type of underwear into a weapon in the mysterious space known as "Pants Dimension." When she puts on her glasses, she transforms into a geek girl, but both are her true identities.

name: Haruna Otonashi
description: Originally from the school paper, after seeing Raimon play against Teikoku, she became a big fan and decided to be a manager. She is the sister of Yuuto Kidou, however, has not had any contact with him for 6 years.

name: Hitomi
description: An Ex-Code: Breaker, the former Code: 01 who was greatly respected by his comrades and subordinates, namely Oogami and Kanda. He is "lackadaisical and never gives a straight answer" according to Oogami. His power is electricity, which can be used to manipulate people. ~! As Code: 01, Hitomi was greatly frustrated by the "non-existent" nature of the Code:Breakers, how they risked their lives fighting evil and yet died unrecognized. He left Eden, and later returned to kidnap Prime Minister Fujiwar

Having a heart of justice and a burning aggression towards mononoke, Ichika is a perfect member for the Bureau. Though she can act as a spy for the Bureau, she is more than capable of combating against a mononoke.
